PR title: use Conventional Commits — feat(scope): …, fix(scope): …,
chore(scope): …, docs(scope): …, refactor(scope): …, test(scope): …
Keep PRs under ~400 lines of diff when possible.
-->

## Summary

<!-- 1-3 bullets describing what and why. Focus on the why. -->

-

## Definition of Done

- [ ] Typed strict, lint clean (`npm run typecheck && npm run lint`)
- [ ] Tests written and passing (`npm test`)
- [ ] Explicit loading / empty / error states for every new view
- [ ] Mobile responsive
- [ ] Keyboard accessible (Tab / Enter / Escape)
- [ ] Audit log written for every mutation (Reservation, Payment, Property, Guest)
- [ ] i18n: FR keys added; EN/AR keys added or stubbed
- [ ] Doc updated (README, CLAUDE.md, ADR if architectural)
- [ ] Diff < 400 lines (or justified)
